language.name: Swift
language.creator: Apple
language.details: Swift is a modern programming language created by Apple. It is mainly used to build apps for iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Apple TV.

language.name: Python
language.creator: Guido van Rossum
language.details: Python is a popular programming language known for being easy to read and beginner friendly. It is used in web development, automation, data science, and artificial intelligence.

language.name: JavaScript
language.creator: Brendan Eich
language.details: JavaScript is mainly used to create interactive websites. It runs in web browsers and is also used on servers with Node.js.

language.name: Java
language.creator: James Gosling
language.details: Java is an object-oriented programming language used for enterprise systems, Android apps, backend services, and large applications.

language.name: C#
language.creator: Microsoft
language.details: C# is a programming language developed by Microsoft. It is used for Windows applications, web applications, backend services, and games with Unity.

language.name: C++
language.creator: Bjarne Stroustrup
language.details: C++ is a powerful programming language used for high-performance software, operating systems, game engines, and embedded systems.

language.name: Go
language.creator: Google
language.details: Go is a programming language created by Google. It is simple, fast, and commonly used for backend services, cloud tools, and network applications.

language.name: Rust
language.creator: Graydon Hoare
language.details: Rust is a systems programming language focused on speed, safety, and memory management. It helps developers build reliable and efficient software.

language.name: Kotlin
language.creator: JetBrains
language.details: Kotlin is a modern programming language developed by JetBrains. It is widely used for Android development and can also be used for backend and multiplatform apps.

language.name: TypeScript
language.creator: Microsoft
language.details: TypeScript is a programming language created by Microsoft. It adds types to JavaScript, making large web applications easier to build and maintain.
